evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 live first-party Family Resource Center homepage https://familyresourcecenter.myflfamilies.com/ and its published dataset https://familyresourcecenter.myflfamilies.com/providers.csv. The homepage JavaScript explicitly fetches providers.csv to populate the county filter, and the official CSV contains only 39 rows covering 34 unique Florida counties. The public first-party dataset therefore stops at 34/67 counties, so the remaining 33 counties are absent from the published county-local routing contract rather than merely hidden behind the blocked MyACCESS browser lane.
